title: DONATIONS - 211info
text: FIRST CHRISTIAN CHURCH HELPING HEARTS ROOM DONATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Accepts donations of clothing, light blankets and bedding items, sleeping bags, tarps, tents, and personal hygiene items. Volunteer opportunities are also available. 1166 Oak Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Tuesday/Thursday 10am-2pm (541) 344-1425 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 344-1425 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for donation drop off time. Helping Hearts Greeters will meet you in the back parking lot. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Lane County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Parking lot at the back of the church Services: Bedding/Linen Donation Programs Camping Gear Donation Programs Clothing Donation Programs Personal/Grooming Supplies Donation Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: VOLUNTEER OPPORTUNITIES - VOLUNTEERING If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
